channel.title: CeredigionNaturePartnership on Nature Works

item.title: Dr Katy Peat on The State of Nature report
item.description:
I went to a brilliant Ceredigion Nature Partnership meeting the other day, this is a great summary by Dr Katy Peat

I went to a great Ceredigion Nature Partnership online meeting last week. http://localhost:1313/blog/240121-katy-peat-state-nature/
